queries.sql: UPDATE question_group SET gr_group = SUBSTRING(gr_class, 1, 2), gr_group_sub = SUBSTRING(gr_class, 4, 2), gr_header = CASE WHEN gr_class LIKE '%00.0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ;
